raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/ProactiveA: Staged tasks now render as id-less 'already captured' evidence via a pure, unit-tested contextEvidencePrompt helper, so they can no longer be echoed back as duplicate_of:0 to update a non-existent backend task.
stopMonitoring now clears capture-recovery/background-polling state and timers, plus a pure ProactiveCapturePolicy gate, so a stop mid-recovery cannot silently disable capture on the next start.
